$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema, enabling editor autocomplete.

name.description: The original objects.dat entry name, preserving casing (e.g. StBody).

materials.description: One entry per distinct (texId, flags, color, alpha) face tuple, keyed m0, m1, … and referenced by the OBJs' usemtl lines.

texture.description: The source texture filename from objects.dat's texture-name table (e.g. MULT15.TGA), or null for an untextured face.

color.description: Face diffuse colour as [r, g, b], each 0-255.
